rulings.Case Title: ERIC LINKER VS. PRIVANTHA RUWIN PERERA ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion Of Cross-Defendants Vanguard Properties, Inc., Deborah Nguyen, And Christian Nguyen To Strike Portions Of Privantha Ruwin Pereras Cross-Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 03, 2019 line 1. CROSS DEFENDANT DEBORAH NGUYEN, CHRISTIAN NGUYEN, VANGUARD PROPERTIES, INC. Notice Of Motion And Motion Of Cross-Defendants Vanguard Properties, Inc., Deborah Nguyen, And Christian Nguyen To Strike Portions Of Privantha Ruwin Pereras Cross-Complaint is CONTINUED to January 8, 2020 for Cross-Defendant to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide a courtesy copy of the moving papers to Department 501 no later than December 18, 2019 with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date.=(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CHI CHI BEIGNET INC DOING BUSINESS AS BISCUITS VS. SAEED KHAN ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR LEAVE TO Motion For Leave To File Plaintiffs Second Amended Verified Complaint For Damages And Preliminary And Permanent Injunction (Nuisance And Negligence
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 03, 2019 line 3. PLAINTIFF CHI CHI BEIGNET INC DOING BUSINESS AS BISCUITS MOTION FOR LEAVE TO Motion For Leave To File Plaintiffs Second Amended Verified Complaint For Damages And Preliminary And Permanent Injunction (Nuisance And Negligence is GRANTED. Plaintiff must file and serve the Second Amended Verified Complaint for Damages and Preliminary and Permanent Injunction on December 3, 2019.=(501/REQ)
